Skill Path: Itemcraft (Religion)

Your knowledge of magical items empowers you use them to beyond their limits.

While developing your skills in Religion you chose to focus specifically on Itemcraft (Religion), learning basic techniques.You gain the following trained feats: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.IlOQuCQIhjJpig3S]{Quick Identification}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.uR62fVC9FyQAMCO1]{Trick Magic Item}.

This path focuses on @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.eReSHVEPCsdkSL4G]{Identify Magic}.

Path Progression

  • Trained: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.IlOQuCQIhjJpig3S]{Quick Identification}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.uR62fVC9FyQAMCO1]{Trick Magic Item}
  • Expert: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.XmF4q4rzKWg55vG4]{Assured Identification}
  • Master: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-skillpaths.pf2e-skillpath-compendium.Item.244lEOUo6eIwR9eW]{Lingering Activation}
  • Legendary: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.dYMxP8SsHrwOze8v]{Divine Guidance}
